summary: Production A-to-Z Testing completed for Visionary Suite Story → Video Pipeline. CRITICAL: Production site (https://www.visionary-suite.com) returns 502 Bad Gateway on API endpoints. Testing completed on preview environment (video-job-queue-1.preview.emergentagent.com). 17/17 backend API tests passed. Pipeline creates jobs correctly, charges 50 credits, validates inputs. Jobs queue up but processing is slow (7 jobs queued, 1 worker). Frontend login/dashboard/Story Video Studio all functional.

critical.issue: PRODUCTION API DOWN - 502 Bad Gateway on ALL API endpoints. Frontend HTML loads (from CDN) but backend API is unreachable.

minor.issue: Pipeline worker capacity issue - 7 jobs queued, only 1 worker with max_concurrent=1. Jobs stay in QUEUED state for extended periods.
Test user (test@visionary-suite.com) authentication fails with 'Invalid email or password' - user may not exist in production DB or password differs

integration_issues.issue: Login fails on www.visionary-suite.com due to 502 backend errors

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays bottom UI elements - minor

action_items: CRITICAL: Investigate and fix 502 Bad Gateway on production API (https://www.visionary-suite.com). Backend pod may be crashed or unresponsive.
HIGH: Increase pipeline workers from 1 to 3+ workers for production workload
MEDIUM: Verify test@visionary-suite.com user exists in production DB with correct password
LOW: Consider dismissing cookie consent on user interaction to prevent UI overlap
critical_code_review_comments: pipeline_engine.py: Credit deduction (50/80/120) on job create and refund on failure - verified
pipeline_engine.py: Validation rejects story < 50 chars and empty titles correctly
pipeline_engine.py: Copyright blocking (Disney, Marvel, etc.) working
StoryVideoPipeline.js: 4 phases (input/processing/done/error) with proper data-testid attributes
StoryVideoPipeline.js: Auto-resume of active jobs working - shows processing phase if job in progress

success_rate.backend: 100% (17/17 tests on preview, 0% on production due to 502)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard, Login, Story Video Studio all functional on preview)

test_credentials.test_user_production: test@visionary-suite.com / Test@2026# (NOT WORKING - invalid credentials error)

seed_data_creation: Created 8+ test pipeline jobs during testing: TEST_Iter152_Run1-5, TEST_Concurrent_0-2
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL: Production API (www.visionary-suite.com) is DOWN with 502 errors. All testing was done on preview environment. Pipeline worker has 7 jobs queued but only 1 worker - processing is slow. Demo user has unlimited credits. Story Video Studio auto-resumes active jobs when user visits the page.

GET /api/pipeline/user-jobs.returns: list of user's pipeline jobs sorted by created_at

Frontend Dashboard.features: Feature cards, credits display, daily reward, profile

Frontend Story Video Studio.features: Input form, style selection, age/voice selection, generate button

rca_of_the_issue: Production backend at https://www.visionary-suite.com is returning 502 Bad Gateway errors. The frontend HTML/JS loads (served from CDN/static hosting) but all /api/* endpoints fail. This indicates the backend pod/container may be crashed, the nginx reverse proxy may be misconfigured, or there's a network issue between nginx and the backend service. The preview environment (video-job-queue-1.preview.emergentagent.com) is fully functional, suggesting the code is correct but production deployment has issues.
